initial_state.label: cubic Pm-3m CsInH3 ambient endpoint
initial_state.role: first fully failed endpoint in repo-local decompression map

final_state.label: lower-symmetry framework-tilted CsInH3-like endpoint
final_state.character: R-point octahedral or framework tilting distortion

barrier.barrier_kind: local barrierless descent from unstable cubic endpoint
barrier.pressure_window_represented: ambient endpoint after full pressure release
barrier.not_equal_to: full 3 GPa to 0 GPa kinetic barrier

method.primary: soft-mode proxy from direct dynamic-instability evidence
method.qe_neb_relevance: useful only after defining compatible endpoints above the spinodal
method.cell_coupling_limitation: full strain-coupled pre-spinodal kinetics remain unresolved

competing_routes.reason: thermodynamic penalty at 0 GPa is large, but dynamic symmetry lowering fails first

analog_limit.statement: Pressure-quench success in Hg1223 motivates the route class but does not transfer to CsInH3 without direct barrier evidence.
